report.summary: Community growth cycle v35 (Mar 16): Calendar extended to May 19–25 with 3 content pillars — Story Protocol onchain IP revolution (PIL framework, Aster Chain L1, $140M+ raised, AI agent commerce), RWA × Staked ETFs convergence (Ondo $800M+ TVL, SEC-CFTC MOU regulatory clarity, BlackRock/Fidelity filings), and DeFi accessibility (copy trading + trading bots guides). Weekly newsletter drafted for Thu May 22 + community poll (Fri May 23). Two social cards created: social-story-protocol-ip.svg (purple/indigo theme, 3 feature cards, 4 stat panels) and social-rwa-staked-etfs.svg (gold/blue TradFi theme, 3 pillar cards, yield convergence flow).

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Mon May 19 — Twitter thread (5 posts): Story Protocol onchain IP — programmable IP licensing, IP Graph provenance, AI agent commerce via PIL, $140M+ raised, Aster Chain L1; CTA to /learn/story-protocol-ip-guide + /learn/aster-chain-guide

Tue May 20 — Twitter thread (5 posts): RWA × Staked ETFs — Ondo Finance ($800M+ TVL, USDY ~5% APY), staked crypto ETFs (BlackRock/Fidelity/21Shares filings), SEC-CFTC MOU joint oversight, TradFi-DeFi yield convergence ($10T+ addressable); CTA to /learn/staked-crypto-etfs-guide-2026 + /learn/sec-cftc-mou-crypto-guide

Wed May 21 — Twitter standalone: Copy trading & trading bots — Bybit/Bitget/OKX copy trading, grid/DCA/arbitrage bots, risk management; CTA to /learn/crypto-copy-trading-guide + /learn/crypto-trading-bots-guide-2026

Thu May 22 — Full weekly newsletter: Story Protocol IP deep-dive, RWA + staked ETFs market context, copy trading & bots toolkit, Morpho callback, Tool of the Week (/tools/backtesting-engine), tease Jupiter + Ondo guides
Fri May 23 — Twitter poll: 'Most exciting crypto narrative in 2026?' (RWAs / AI Agents & IP / Staked ETFs / Memecoins)
Sat May 24 — Weekend wrap tweet: Story Protocol + staked ETFs + SEC-CFTC MOU + copy trading + Morpho recap; teases Jupiter & Ondo for next week

sections.title: Visual Assets Created
items: social-story-protocol-ip.svg — 1200x630 social card: dark purple/indigo theme; 'ONCHAIN IP · 2026' badge; 'Story Protocol — The IP Revolution Goes Onchain' headline; 3 feature cards (Programmable IP with $140M+ raised, IP Graph with auto royalties, AI × IP with agent commerce) in purple/indigo/cyan borders; 4 stat panels (Aster Chain IP-Native L1, PIL Framework, Cosmos IBC, 100+ dApps); CTA bar linking /learn/story-protocol-ip-guide. Saved to /public/social-story-protocol-ip.svg

social-rwa-staked-etfs.svg — 1200x630 social card: dark blue/gold TradFi theme; 'RWA × STAKED ETFS · 2026' badge; 'Where TradFi Meets DeFi Yield' headline; 3 pillar cards (Ondo Finance $800M+ TVL gold border, Staked ETFs $10T+ TAM blue border, SEC-CFTC MOU teal border) with top color bars; yield convergence flow (T-Bills → RWA Tokens → Staked ETFs → Restaking → Unified Yield); CTA bar linking /learn/staked-crypto-etfs-guide-2026. Saved to /public/social-rwa-staked-etfs.svg

sections.title: Analytics Context
items: Calendar coverage: v35 fills May 19–25. Combined with v17–v34, full social calendar now spans Mar 16 – May 25 (10+ weeks of content queued).

Today's publishes (Story Protocol, Aster Chain, copy trading, trading bots, staked ETFs, SEC-CFTC MOU) provide 6 fresh pages for social amplification. These are high-intent topics with strong search volume.
The RWA × Staked ETF convergence is a differentiated angle — most crypto media covers these separately. Combining them positions degen0x as thinking about the full yield stack.
Story Protocol's IP narrative is early-stage with low competition in search. Getting in now builds topical authority before the narrative matures.
Copy trading and trading bots guides target a broader, less crypto-native audience — good for top-of-funnel traffic expansion.
478 pages now published, 2 remaining in queue (Jupiter + Ondo). Near queue exhaustion — next content cycle should prioritize new page scaffolding.
No outstanding community feedback, bug reports, or DMs requiring response this cycle.
Story Protocol social card saved to /public/social-story-protocol-ip.svg
RWA × Staked ETFs social card saved to /public/social-rwa-staked-etfs.svg
